manifest.configGroups.schedule.label: Schedule
manifest.config.defaultTz.label: Default timezone
manifest.config.defaultTz.description: IANA timezone (e.g. Asia/Shanghai) applied to cron jobs whose creator didn't specify one. Leave blank to use the server's local timezone. Only affects cron-type jobs; once-type jobs use absolute timestamps.
delete.title: Delete scheduled job?
manifest.description: Scheduled and recurring jobs. Fire a message into a chat session or drop a task on the workboard at a future time (once) or on a cron schedule. Timezone-aware. The agent's `schedule` tool and a calendar panel both manage jobs.
